trigger_condition: text contains only zero-width spaces (\u200B, \u200C, \u200D, \uFEFF) or non-breaking spaces (\u00A0)
potential_consequence: isDraftInvalid returns false (draft considered valid) but validateRuleText catches these characters — draft can never be committed, yet export readiness reports ready

trigger_condition: multiple ruleTextDrafts entries are invalid simultaneously
guard_snippet: reason: "Fix invalid Rule text before exporting."
potential_consequence: User sees single generic reason regardless of count — no way to distinguish one invalid rule from several without manual inspection

trigger_condition: handleRemoveRule succeeds in setRuleTextDrafts but applyPlaybookUpdate throws or React batches inconsistently
guard_snippet: cleanup of draft removed before playbook update — they are independent setState calls
potential_consequence: Orphaned draft entries in ruleTextDrafts for rule IDs that no longer exist in playbook.rules; exportReadiness re-derives with stale state

trigger_condition: ruleTextDrafts contains entry for a rule ID that was removed from playbook.rules then re-added with different text
guard_snippet: No cross-check between ruleTextDrafts keys and playbook.rules IDs
potential_consequence: Stale draft masks the committed rule text in getRuleDisplayText — display shows old invalid draft instead of current committed text

trigger_condition: ruleTextDrafts[ruleId] contains only zero-width spaces (\u200B etc.)
potential_consequence: getRuleError returns undefined (no error), but validateRuleText would reject this text — UI shows draft as 'valid' but rule can never be committed

trigger_condition: Page contains a second element with role 'button' whose accessible name matches /download/i (e.g., 'Download Plan', 'Download Report')
potential_consequence: Test interacts with or asserts on the wrong element — false pass or element-not-found failure

trigger_condition: playbook is non-null but has empty rules array, ruleTextDrafts is empty
guard_snippet: Returns { canExport: true } without checking playbook.rules content
potential_consequence: Export readiness reports true for an empty playbook with no rules — no review surface exists but export is permitted

trigger_condition: ruleTextDrafts setState uses spread which creates new object reference even when content unchanged
potential_consequence: Re-render cascade on unrelated state updates — unnecessary computeExportReadiness call every render (minor perf)
